column8: ANGULAR COBBLES and GRAVELS of moderately decomposed granite with some boulders in SAND and some red brick and concrete fragments. (FILL)
Medium dense, grey, silty fine to medium SAND, with occasionally some shell fragments. (MARINE DEPOSIT)
Medium dense, grey, clayey silty fine to medium SAND. (ALLUVIUM)
Sub-rounded COBBLES and GRAVELS of moderately decomposed rock.

Moderately weak to moderately strong, brownish pink speckled black fine to coarse grained GRANITE (ALLUVIUM) - extremely weak, brownish pink speckled black, completely decomposed, medium to coarse grained GRANITE (Very soft, gravelly silty medium to coarse SAND.) Weak, highly decomposed zone at 24.23m-24.33m.

Moderately weak to moderately strong, brownish pink speckled black fine to coarse grained GRANITE with some quartz veins, extremely narrow, rough planar extremely jointed, moderately decomposed, medium to coarse grained, often iron stained and kaolin coated joints dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees and 50 degrees-60 degrees.
